title: gonolobus viridiflorus
intro: Gonolobus viridiflorus, also known as the green-flowering Gonolobus, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonolobus viridiflorus include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healer and anti-septic agent. Traditionally, Gonolobus viridiflorus is prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
